title: Type checker incorrectly resolving unpacked array slice
body:
I'd received an internal error in V3EmitCImp regarding incorrectly handled `AstSliceSel` node. It should not be present at this stage.
Possibly related with https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/5664 and https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/5666.
Verilated using master as of https://github.com/verilator/verilator/commit/9656311521a7fe33054a4921986fa0cf8f6c0f5f.

## Error

```cpp
- V3EmitCImp.cpp:981: emitcImp: 
%Error: t/t_unexpected_call_bug.v:9:20: Internal: Unexpected Call
-node: SLICESEL 0x5555563c1780 <e2316> {f9au} @dt=0x5555562eecd0@(w1)u[0:0] decl[0:0]
    9 |    assign o = array[0:0];
      |                    ^
%Error: Internal Error: t/t_unexpected_call_bug.v:9:20: ../V3AstNodeExpr.h:4756: Unexpected Call
-node: SLICESEL 0x5555563c1780 <e2316> {f9au} @dt=0x5555562eecd0@(w1)u[0:0] decl[0:0]
    9 |    assign o = array[0:0];
      |                    ^
```

## Failing test

```sv
// DESCRIPTION: Verilator: Verilog Test module
//
// This file ONLY is placed under the Creative Commons Public Domain, for
// any use, without warranty, 2024 by Antmicro.
// SPDX-License-Identifier: CC0-1.0

module t(output o);
   reg array [255:0];
   assign o = array[0:0];
endmodule
```

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# DESCRIPTION: Verilator: Verilog Test driver/expect definition
#
# Copyright 2024 by Wilson Snyder. This program is free software; you
# can redistribute it and/or modify it under the terms of either the GNU
# Lesser General Public License Version 3 or the Perl Artistic License
# Version 2.0.
# SPDX-License-Identifier: LGPL-3.0-only OR Artistic-2.0

import vltest_bootstrap

test.scenarios('vlt')
test.lint()
test.passes()
```
